MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-01-2003 VACATED. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. MATTER SETTLED. JPT N. ROSENQUEST, CLERK J.BAUBEL, REPORTER K. FARNSWORTH (501A)
MINUTES FOR MAR-27-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAM, KWONG SANG AS TO DEFENDANT KRAUSE, ROY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-27-2003 VACATED. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH RESPECT TO THE PREMISES DESCRIBED AS 522 HYDE ST. #11 AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WILL WITH 30 DAYS OR BY APRIL 30, 2003 HAVE THE PREMISES INSPECTED BY A LICENSED INDUSTRIAL HYGENIST. ANY WORK BASED ON THEIR REPORT WILL BEGIN NOT EARLIER THAN JULY 1, 2003 AND NO LATER THAN JULY 15, 2003. ANY WORK DONE WILL BE DONE BY A LICENSED MOLD REMEDIATION WITH PERMITS AS REQUIRED BY LAW. PAST RENT OF $4549.86 WITHIN 5 DAYS TO BE PAID INTO THE DEFENDANT ATTORNEY'S TRUST ACCOUNT AND TO BE HELD THERE UNTIL MOLD REPAIRS ARE COMPLETED AND CERTIFIED BY THE INDUSTRIAL HYGENIST OR FIRM. IF THERE IS ANY DISPLACEMENT OF DEFENDANT KRAUSE, HIS RENT WILL ABATE FOR THE PERIOD HE IS OUT OF POSESSION, BASED ON THE CONTRACTOR'S ESTIMATE OF WORK DAYS. IF REMEDIATION WILL TAKE OVER 45 DAYS, COUNSEL WILL MEET AND CONFER WITHIN 2 DAYS. IF THE MATTER IS NOT RESOLVED ANY PARY CAN MAKE A MOTION TO THE COURT. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION. EACH SIDE PAYS ITS OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS EXCEPT FOR BREACH OF AGREEMENT OR ENFORCEMENT. THE CURRENT RENT IS TO BE PAID AS DUE ON APRIL 1, 2003. THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS FOR ALL PAST DUE RENT, MOLD AND ALL CLAIMS. IF ALL CONDITIONS ARE PERFORMED PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT HARASS OR RETALIATE AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. JPT N. ROSENQUEST, CLERK J. BAUBEL, REPORTER K. FARNSWORTH (501A)
JURY FEES OF 150.00 FOR TRANSACTION W1603324J005 TRANSFERRED INTO JPLUS
